description_long: This is a standard 12 fl oz aluminum can of diet soda, featuring a vibrant red background with bold white and silver text. The front of the can prominently displays the words 'Diet Soda' and '0 Calories!' in large, eye-catching fonts, along with a 'NEW FORMULA' starburst graphic. The sides of the can include additional information such as '0 CALORIES PER SERVING', a list of ingredients, and a detailed nutrition facts panel. The can's surface is metallic and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The overall design is typical of soft drink cans found in urban environments, intended for single-use consumption.
description: A glossy red aluminum can of diet soda with bold white text, a 'NEW FORMULA' graphic, and detailed nutritional labeling. The can features a standard pull-tab top and is designed for single-use beverage consumption.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main 'Diet Soda' branding, '0 Calories!' claim, and the 'NEW FORMULA' starburst graphic on a red background.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the '0 CALORIES PER SERVING' text and part of the ingredients and nutrition facts panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full nutrition facts panel, a detailed list of ingredients, and a 'Please Recycle' message.
description_view_3: This view shows the side curve of the can with partial branding and a note about vitamin content near the base.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back and side of the can, including calorie count and vitamin content.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A 'NEW FORMULA' starburst graphic is visible on the front of the can.
